title: Living in Boulder vlog 4/19/18 Free Audio History Books pages

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog covering several personal updates: a knee injury from biking, ongoing work on his website's free audio history books page (managing LibriVox and Kindle links, noting some books have been removed or repriced), and his recent deep dive into astrology including his full birth chart. He also mentions a request video he made about Meghan Markle and the Royal Family.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Values making ancient texts freely accessible and linkable to encourage reading
Finds it genuinely interesting and worth learning in depth
Believes memorizing a book list helps people read consistently

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's April 20th, Friday at 2am, and this will be my vlog for the 2019 song, Do It On Like Every Day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My left knee was hurting me so bad, even though it's been like a week since I've ridden my bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was crying out in agony from the pain in my knee, specifically the tendon from the front of my knee to the top of my kneecap.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When you push down on the top of the kneecap, it was really sore.

claims.subject: Kyle's mom
claims.claim: My mom said it takes two weeks for soft tissue to heal.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not exercising now anyways.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was helping my mom yesterday and today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm still working on audio books on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm working on it with a faster computer and can kind of burn through it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought I was going to get sitting down with the center, but I forgot there are other pages I have to do.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm attaching all the links to those pages.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm having to remove some books that aren't on Kindle anymore.

claims.subject: Kindle
claims.claim: I didn't know that Kindle would change availability of really old books from hundreds of years ago.

claims.subject: Kindle
claims.claim: Sometimes Kindle makes old books cost money or just takes them off.

claims.subject: Kindle
claims.claim: There was a book called 'Biblical Reasons for Slavery' that they took clear off.

claims.subject: Kindle
claims.claim: A couple of books you have to pay a dollar for on Kindle, but then it's free out of also.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The way it works is that if a book is on LibriVox and Kindle, I'll use the LibriVox version.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If I had more time, I would have the Kindle link for all books on LibriVox.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think the general rule of thumb is if it's on LibriVox, then it's also going to be on Kindle.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's good to have a text version in case you hear something interesting and want to reference it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: In the future, computers might allow you to click directly to a specific part of a book.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to reference ancient writers as much as I can on my personal website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was listening to stuff about astrology, figuring out all my stars, and memorizing it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm a Capricorn, but my rising sign is Leo and my moon is Aquarius.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: 25% of my sign is Aquarius, three Aquarius, three Sagittarius.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was born the night of the Paralympic and the Czech, which is a dose of Uranus and Mars.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I like to watch what people think about Mercury and Sagittarius.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I should subscribe to all those astrology people.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I just did my request video about the Royal Family, about Meghan Markle.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My lower back is starting to hurt, and I might even be slipping discs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel a little bit crooked right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm extremely curious to know how many pages of text and how long it is of all these audio books once it's all done.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think memorizing the books is something I can always have.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The only reason people don't always have a book to listen to is because our short-term memory isn't good enough to remember all the books we'd like to hear.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If you can memorize those books, then you can remember a book you want to read and do it every day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not listening to the books right now because I'm just working on them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm doing the astrology stuff because it's interesting.
